full_name: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard v4.0

controls.requirement: Network Security Controls Installed and Maintained
controls.description: Firewalls and other network security controls must restrict traffic between untrusted networks and the cardholder data environment (CDE).
controls.logic: FAIL if any network_device in the CDE has firewall_enabled = FALSE, or if any inbound rule allows unrestricted access from external networks to CDE systems.

controls.description: All vendor-supplied default passwords and other default security parameters must be changed before deploying system components.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system_component record has default_credentials_changed = FALSE or last_password_change = NULL for service accounts.

controls.description: All unnecessary services, protocols, daemons, and functions must be disabled.
controls.logic: FAIL if any CDE system has unnecessary_services_disabled = FALSE, or if open_ports_count exceeds approved_ports_list count.

controls.requirement: Primary Account Numbers (PANs) Masked or Encrypted
controls.description: Primary Account Numbers (PANs) must not be stored unless necessary, and if stored must be rendered unreadable through strong encryption or truncation.
controls.logic: FAIL if any transaction record stores full_pan in plaintext, or if pan_encryption_method = 'NONE' or pan_storage_justified = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Sensitive Authentication Data Not Stored After Authorization
controls.description: Sensitive authentication data (CVV, PIN, track data) must not be stored after authorization.
controls.logic: FAIL if any transaction_data record has cvv_stored = TRUE, pin_stored = TRUE, or track_data_stored = TRUE.

controls.requirement: Data Retention and Disposal Policy Enforced
controls.description: Card data must only be retained as long as required by business or legal needs, and disposal must be secure.
controls.logic: FAIL if any cardholder_data record has created_date older than retention_policy_days and deletion_status != 'SECURELY_DISPOSED'.

controls.requirement: Strong Cryptography Used for Cardholder Data Transmission
controls.description: Strong cryptographic protocols (TLS 1.2+) must be used when transmitting cardholder data over open, public networks.
controls.logic: FAIL if any payment_transmission record uses protocol IN ('HTTP','TLS1.0','TLS1.1','SSL'), or if encryption_in_transit = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Anti-Malware Installed and Active on All Systems
controls.description: Anti-malware solutions must be deployed on all system components and kept current.
controls.logic: FAIL if any CDE system has antimalware_installed = FALSE, or if antimalware_definitions_date is older than 7 days.

controls.description: Critical security patches must be installed within one month of release. High-risk patches within 3 months.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical_patch has patch_release_date older than 30 days and patch_applied = FALSE, or if high_risk_patch older than 90 days is unapplied.

controls.domain: Requirement 7: Access Control — Need to Know
controls.requirement: Access to Cardholder Data Restricted by Business Need
controls.description: Access to system components and cardholder data must be limited to only those individuals whose job requires it.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user has access to cardholder_data but business_justification = NULL or role_requires_access = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Unique User IDs for All System Access
controls.description: Every user must be assigned a unique ID before allowing access to system components or cardholder data.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account is a shared_account = TRUE accessing CDE systems, or if username is a generic/shared name.

controls.description: MFA must be implemented for all access to the CDE and for all remote network access.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user with cde_access = TRUE or remote_access = TRUE has mfa_enabled = FALSE.

controls.description: User passwords must meet minimum complexity requirements and be changed at least every 90 days.
controls.logic: FAIL if password_complexity_enforced = FALSE, or if any user has password_last_changed older than 90 days.

controls.requirement: Audit Logs Created for All Access to CDE
controls.description: Audit logs capturing user activities, exceptions, and security events in the CDE must be generated and retained.
controls.logic: FAIL if any CDE system has audit_logging_enabled = FALSE, or if log_retention_days < 90, or if logs are modifiable without detection.

controls.description: Logs for all system components must be reviewed at least daily to identify anomalies and suspicious activity.
controls.logic: FAIL if log_review_last_date is older than 1 day, or if automated_log_review_enabled = FALSE and no manual_review_evidence exists.

controls.description: Internal and external vulnerability scans of the CDE must be conducted at least quarterly.
controls.logic: FAIL if last_internal_scan_date or last_external_scan_date is older than 90 days, or if last_scan_result has unresolved HIGH/CRITICAL findings.

controls.description: Penetration tests of the CDE must be conducted at least annually and after any significant infrastructure or application changes.
controls.logic: FAIL if penetration_test_date is older than 12 months, or if pentest_findings_remediated = FALSE for any HIGH/CRITICAL finding.

controls.description: A comprehensive information security policy must be established, published, maintained, and disseminated to all relevant personnel.
controls.logic: FAIL if no information_security_policy exists, or if policy_last_reviewed is older than 12 months, or if staff_acknowledgement_rate < 95%.

controls.description: Third-party service providers with access to cardholder data must be managed with security requirements in contracts and annual assessments.
controls.logic: FAIL if any tpsp record with cde_access = TRUE has no security_assessment in the last 12 months, or if compliance_acknowledgement_signed = FALSE.
